name: ERRORQUAKE-10K
description: A 10,000-query benchmark scoring LLM responses on a continuous 9-level error severity scale across 8 domains and 5 difficulty tiers. Includes per-model severity distributions and Gutenberg-Richter b-value estimates for 21 open-weight instruction-tuned models.

distribution.name: per_query_scores.csv
distribution.description: Per-query severity scores for all 21 models across 10,000 queries

distribution.name: model_evaluations/
distribution.description: Raw model responses for each of 21 models (JSONL format)

rai:dataCollection: Queries generated by frontier LLM, stratified across 8 domains and 5 difficulty tiers. Model responses collected via NVIDIA NIM API. Dual-judge scoring with 8-model round-robin pool.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: None. Dataset contains factual questions and model responses only.
rai:dataPreprocessing: Severity scores quantized to 0.5 increments on 0.0-4.0 scale. Dual-judge resolution: agreement within 1.0 uses primary; otherwise averaged or tiebroken.
rai:useCases: Evaluating LLM error severity distributions, model selection for deployment risk assessment, studying scaling effects on tail severity.
rai:knownLimitations: Open-weight models only. LLM-generated queries (not human-authored). Judge ICC(2,k=2) = 0.545. 33.5% overcall rate at score 2.0.
